remember: Identify the basic components of a web browser

Recall the types of web pages
Explain the concept of web technologies basics

understand: Describe the role of HTTP in transferring data between web servers and clients
Explain how web servers process client requests

apply: Use a web browser to access and navigate web pages
Use HTTP to transfer data between a web server and a client
Apply the concept of URL to access web pages
Use a web server to process client requests

analyze: Analyze the role of HTTP in transferring data between web servers and clients
Analyze the different types of web servers and their advantages
Analyze the concept of web hosting and its impact on web development
Compare and contrast different web browsers

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, the objectives of this chapter are to understand the basic concepts of web technologies, including the role of HTTP, web servers, and URLs.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the following from this chapter: HTTP, web servers, URLs, web hosting, web browsers, and the importance of web technologies basics in web development.
